description: On the Remorath ship's bridge, May and Deke frantically decipher alien controls to redirect the missiles away from the Lighthouse. Qovas confronts them, but May and Deke manage to change the target, turning the Remorath weapons against their own ship. Their quick thinking saves the Lighthouse as they narrowly escape.

transcript.line: Okay... okay, the one that looks like the house with the broken roof? I think that's a three.
And then... and then it's... like a... like a... like a chair with... with, some wavy lines.
Got it. All right, give me the next one so we can get off this ship.
You will never get off this ship.
Hey, I'm trying, okay? Okay. Here we go. Here we go. Here we go. Um... Uh... There's a crooked something... something... Damn it!
So... You made out with May.
People see what they want to see, I guess.
We're ready for lift off. Strap yourselves in. This could get bumpy.
How do you think she's doing?
Having the time of her life.
Almost done! Okay. Crooked teapot and, uh...
You have just sealed the fate of everyone in your base. And now you will die.
Well, one little thing, we changed the target. Told ya I didn't need a gun to stop you.
